# Partner Livingku

> Trusted co-living and apartment directory in Indonesia.

## About

Partner Livingku is a property search platform for co-living spaces and apartments
across Indonesia. We provide verified listings with transparent pricing, real on-site
photos, and direct contact with property owners via WhatsApp — no hidden fees,
no fake listings.

## Services

- Exclusive co-living, women-only co-living, men-only co-living, mixed co-living
- Studio, 1BR, and 2BR apartments
- Daily, weekly, and monthly rental options
- Available in: Jakarta, Bandung, Surabaya, Bali, Yogyakarta, Medan, and other cities

## Property Management Services

Partner Livingku also provides end-to-end property management for owners:
- Operational management (housekeeping, maintenance, vendor coordination)
- Financial management (rent collection, monthly reports, cost tracking)
- Listing & marketing (branding, digital marketing on Instagram & TikTok, photography)
- Tenant management (lease agreements, check-in/check-out, customer service)

## How It Works

1. Browse listings on the homepage and filter by city or housing type
2. Click Detail on any listing to view full information and photos
3. Contact the team directly via WhatsApp for availability and booking

## Target Users

- Individuals and families looking for co-living spaces or apartments in Indonesia
- Property owners seeking professional management services
- Relocating professionals and students needing verified, affordable housing

## Contact

- Website: https://partnerlivingku.id
- Operational hours: Monday–Sunday, 08:00–21:00 WIB (UTC+7)

## Pages

- Homepage / Listings: https://partnerlivingku.id
- Privacy Policy: https://partnerlivingku.id/privacy-policy
- Terms of Service: https://partnerlivingku.id/terms-of-service
